intended_use: The diagnostic ultrasound system and probes are designed to obtain ultrasound images and analyze body fluids. The clinical applications include: Fetal/Obstetrics, Abdominal, Gynecology, Pediatric, Sma
intended_use_full: The diagnostic ultrasound system and probes are designed to obtain ultrasound images and analyze body fluids. The clinical applications include: Fetal/Obstetrics, Abdominal, Gynecology, Pediatric, Small Organ, Neonatal Cephalic, Adult Cephalic, Trans-rectal, Trans-vaginal, Muscular-Skeletal (Conventional, Superficial), Urology, Cardiac Adult, Cardiac Pediatric, Trans-esophageal (Cardiac), Peripheral vessel, Lung and Dermatology.
target_condition: Uterine measurements and endometrial assessment during reproductive evaluation
ground_truth: Segmentation ground truth generated by three OB/GYN experts with more than 10 years' experience; images were divided into 3 subsets with each expert drawing ground truths for one subset and cross-checked by the other two experts
other_metrics: Uterus feature point extraction error: 5.8 mm or less; Endometrium feature point extraction error: 4.3 mm or less; Size measurement error: 2.0 mm or less
